Notice Of Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Points And Auth. Decl. Of Terrance Heath
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nancy e. Lofdahl, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Larry Anderson, Marion Greenfield, Willette Huey, and Claudell Huey

No other appearance stated. After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Petitioner Samuel Anderson's motion to compel compliance with subpoena directed to Bank of West is Granted in part. The subpoenas are modified to only require production of records from January 1, 2004 to December 31, 2007 that reflect activity relating to plaintiffs, defendants, Robert E. Anderson, and / or the Robert E. Anderson Living Trust. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
MODIFICATION. Subpoenaed records to include other siblings.
Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena For Bank Records
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nancy e. Lofdahl, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Larry Anderson, Marion Greenfield, Willette Huey, and Claudell Huey

No other appearance stated. After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendants Anderson, Huey, and Greenfield's motion to quash subpoena for bank records is ordered off calendar as there is no proof of service of the motion. In addition, the motion is moot in light of the ruling concerning petitioner's motion to compel compliance with said subpoena. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Defendants Larry Anderson, Marion Greenfield, Willette Huey And Claudell Huey'S Motion For Order Releaseing Adult Protective Services Records
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nancy E. Lofdahl, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Larry Anderson, Marion Greenfield, Willette Huey and Claudell Huey

No other appearance stated, After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Larry Anderson, Marion Greenfield, Willette Huey and Claudell Huey's motion for an order releasing records is denied as Welfare and Institutions Code Section 15633.5 does not provide for release of specified information to private parties involved in litigation concerning allegations of fraud, conversion, and elder abuse. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terrence Heath for and with Cephus Anderson and Samuel Anderson. Lynn White for Larry Anderson.

Mr. Heath reported that a settlement was offered, but not accepted. The Court referred this matter to Pro Bono Mediation, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation must be completed no later than March 14, 2008. The matter was continued to March 24, 2008, for status on mediation. No trial has been set at this time.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terrence Heath for Samuel Anderson. Nancy Lofdahl for and with Larry Anderson.

Mr. Heath stated that he filed the cmplaint on Friday. Ms. Lofdahl requested to strike the complaint, which the court denied. The Court stated that it would not strike the complaint, that the Petition to Remove Trustee was to go off calendar and that the matter would proceed as a civil matter. The Court set a hearing date of January 14, 2008 for status to see the progress of the complaint. The petition for termination of trust, and discharge of trustee was denied.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.
